---
title: "Sophia Martyn"
---

## Sophia Martyn

**Dates:** (1815/6-1898)

**Maiden name:** (Coleridge)

### Description

mother of Paulina Martyn

### Biography

She was a first cousin of Mary Coleridge and Fanny Patteson, her father being the Rev. Dr. James Duke Coleridge (1789-1857). Her mother was Sophia, daughter of Col. Stanhope Badcock. She was the widow of the Rev. Thomas Waddon Martyn (1808-1846), Rector of Lifton and Vicar of Thorverton.

### Letters

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Decr 9th  [1898]](../letters/3388_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Oct 19 [1898]](../letters/3386_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]
- Letter from Febry 8th 1897
- Letter from April 22nd [1872]
- Letter from Novr 19th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
